auth.notes: Token expires in 1 hour. Refresh via POST /auth/refresh.

endpoints.summary: Returns the public profile of any user by ID.

errors.description: No user with this ID exists.

endpoints.summary: Updates the authenticated user's own name and bio.

userId.description: Must match the authenticated user's ID.

errors.description: Authenticated user is not the profile owner.

endpoints.summary: Uploads a new avatar image for the authenticated user.

avatar_url.description: Public CDN URL of the uploaded avatar.

errors.description: Only JPEG and PNG are accepted.
Authenticated user is not the profile owner.

loading_states: Skeleton while GET /users/:userId/profile loads on page mount
Submit button disabled and showing spinner while PATCH /users/:userId/profile is in-flight
Avatar preview shown immediately after file selection; upload indicator while POST /users/:userId/avatar is in-flight
gotchas: The avatar endpoint accepts multipart/form-data — do NOT send JSON.
bio field is optional in the PATCH body — send only fields the user changed.
avatar_url may be null for users who have not uploaded an avatar yet.

be_notes: Added name and bio columns to users table via migration 0012_add_profile_fields.sql.
Avatars are stored in the 'user-avatars' S3 bucket and served via CloudFront.
File size validation happens at the middleware layer before the controller.
